summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM-Sauna new features: Models showcase section, Stock saunas import from catalog, and SEO optimization. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all new features including Models section display, detail modal with gallery, Admin Models tab, Admin Stock Saunas import modal, and Admin SEO tab.

issues: Meta description shows 'A product of emergent.sh' which appears to be a platform default override - actual SEO description from settings is being set but may be overridden by platform

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/models returns models config (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/models-content returns models content (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/models updates config (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/models-content updates content (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/seo returns SEO settings (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/seo updates SEO settings (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/stock-saunas returns stock saunas (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/admin/stock-saunas creates stock sauna (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/sauna/prices returns models from external API (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/sections includes 'models' in section order (200 OK)
Backend: Admin authentication working correctly
Frontend: Models section displays on homepage with 26 model cards
Frontend: Models section title 'Nasze modele saun' displayed correctly
Frontend: 'Modele' navigation link in header scrolls to models section
Frontend: Model card click opens detail modal with gallery
Frontend: Model detail modal has gallery navigation, configure and order buttons
Frontend: Admin Models tab loads with toggle, text fields, and model checkboxes
Frontend: Admin Models tab 'Тексты' and 'Конфигурация' save buttons work
Frontend: Admin Stock Saunas tab has 'Из каталога' import button
Frontend: Import modal shows models from API with 'Добавить' buttons
Frontend: Admin SEO tab loads with all fields (Title, Description, Keywords, OG Image, Canonical URL)
Frontend: Admin SEO tab has Google search preview
Frontend: Admin SEO save button works (shows success message)
Frontend: Page title set from SEO settings via react-helmet-async
Frontend: JSON-LD structured data present on page
Frontend: OG meta tags present on page
seed_data_creation: Test stock sauna created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features (Models showcase, Stock import from catalog, SEO optimization) are fully functional. Backend uses Basic Auth for admin endpoints. External API (wm-kalkulator.pl) is working and returns 26 active models. Admin panel is in Russian language. Models section shows all models when enabled_models array is empty.

models_showcase_section.details: Displays 26 sauna models from external API with images, prices, discounts, and 'Zobacz szczegóły' buttons. Detail modal has gallery navigation, specs, and configure/order buttons.

stock_saunas_import.details: Admin 'В наличии' tab has 'Из каталога' button that opens import modal showing all active models with 'Добавить' buttons to import as stock saunas.

seo_optimization.details: Admin SEO tab has all fields (Title PL/EN, Description PL/EN, Keywords PL/EN, OG Image with upload, Canonical URL) and Google preview. Frontend uses react-helmet-async with JSON-LD structured data.
